response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his resume emphasizes diverse projects over deep GenAI specialization.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and distributed systems experience (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or LLM production systems
Missing explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Limited detail on evaluation pipelines, observability, or enterprise AI integration projects
